issues.title: No tests for CartContext reducer and CartProvider
issues.description: CartContext.tsx contains a cartReducer with 5 action types (ADD_ITEM, REMOVE_ITEM, UPDATE_QUANTITY, CLEAR_CART, HYDRATE) and a deriveState helper. This is core business logic (cart state management, cookie persistence, quantity calculations) with zero test coverage. The reducer is a pure function ideal for unit testing.
issues.rule: testing.md - All new components/hooks/utils must have tests
issues.fix: Create CartContext.test.tsx testing: (1) cartReducer ADD_ITEM with new and existing items, (2) REMOVE_ITEM, (3) UPDATE_QUANTITY including <=0 removal, (4) CLEAR_CART, (5) deriveState correctly computes itemCount and total, (6) useCart throws outside CartProvider.

issues.title: No tests for buildSpecRows utility functions
issues.description: buildSpecRows.ts exports 4 pure functions (buildCommissionRows, buildTicketRows, buildDigitalRows, buildPhysicalRows) that construct spec rows with conditional fields. These are pure domain logic with no dependencies — ideal for unit testing. They have multiple conditional branches (optional fields like revisionsIncluded, commercialUse, location, doorsOpen, etc.) that need coverage.
issues.rule: testing.md - All new utilities must have tests
issues.fix: Create buildSpecRows.test.ts testing each function with: (1) required fields only, (2) all optional fields present, (3) boolean field variations (commercialUse true/false), (4) verify row count matches expected output.

issues.title: No tests for ProductCard component
issues.description: ProductCard is the main product display component with two variants (default, featured), add-to-cart functionality, fly-to-cart animation trigger, out-of-stock disabled state, and cart quantity display. It has significant user interaction logic. No test file exists.
issues.rule: testing.md - All new components must have tests
issues.fix: Create ProductCard.test.tsx testing: (1) renders product name, price, category badge, (2) default vs featured variant rendering differences, (3) add-to-cart button click calls addItem, (4) button disabled when out of stock, (5) shows 'added' state after click, (6) shows quantity badge when item is in cart.

issues.title: No tests for CartDrawer component
issues.description: CartDrawer is a complex component with empty state, item list, quantity controls (increase/decrease), remove item, clear cart, and total calculation display. It has multiple user interactions and conditional rendering. No test file exists.
issues.rule: testing.md - All new components must have tests
issues.fix: Create CartDrawer.test.tsx testing: (1) empty state rendered when no items, (2) items list rendered with correct names and prices, (3) quantity increase/decrease buttons work, (4) remove item button works, (5) clear cart button works, (6) total displays correctly, (7) badge shows item count.

issues.title: No tests for CategoryFilter component
issues.description: CategoryFilter renders filter pills with aria-pressed state and updates URL query state. It uses nuqs for URL state management. No test file exists.
issues.rule: testing.md - All new components must have tests
issues.fix: Create CategoryFilter.test.tsx testing: (1) renders all category buttons, (2) 'All' button is pressed by default, (3) clicking a category updates selection, (4) aria-pressed reflects active state correctly.

issues.title: No tests for TypeFilter component
issues.description: TypeFilter is similar to CategoryFilter — renders type pills with aria-pressed and nuqs URL state. No test file exists.
issues.rule: testing.md - All new components must have tests
issues.fix: Create TypeFilter.test.tsx testing: (1) renders all type buttons, (2) active state toggling, (3) aria-pressed correctness.

issues.title: No tests for SearchBar component
issues.description: SearchBar has debounced input with nuqs URL state sync, external URL change sync via useEffect, and timer cleanup logic. The debounce logic is a common source of bugs. No test file exists.
issues.rule: testing.md - All new components must have tests
issues.fix: Create SearchBar.test.tsx testing: (1) renders input with correct aria-label, (2) typing updates local value, (3) debounced query commit after delay, (4) timer cleanup on rapid typing.

issues.title: No tests for ProductGrid component
issues.description: ProductGrid renders empty state and product list with featured/default variants. It integrates buildGridOrder and useGridCols. No test file exists.
issues.rule: testing.md - All new components must have tests
issues.fix: Create ProductGrid.test.tsx testing: (1) empty state with no products, (2) renders product cards for each product, (3) featured products get col-span-full wrapper and featured variant.

issues.title: No tests for FaqItem component
issues.description: FaqItem has toggle open/close state with aria-expanded attribute. It conditionally renders the answer. No test file exists.
issues.rule: testing.md - All new components must have tests
issues.fix: Create FaqItem.test.tsx testing: (1) renders question, (2) answer hidden initially, (3) click toggles answer visibility, (4) aria-expanded reflects state.

issues.title: No tests for RatingStars component
issues.description: RatingStars renders 5 stars with filled/unfilled state based on rating. It's a pure presentational component ideal for unit testing. No test file exists.
issues.rule: testing.md - All new components must have tests
issues.fix: Create RatingStars.test.tsx testing: (1) renders 5 stars, (2) correct number filled for various ratings (0, 3, 5), (3) rounds rating correctly.

issues.title: Existing buildGridOrder tests are well-written
issues.description: The existing test file for buildGridOrder follows good practices: comprehensive edge cases (empty, single item, all featured, large datasets), parametric testing across column counts, idempotency check, and invariant assertions (no orphans, no duplication, order preservation). This is a good reference for testing patterns in this codebase.

issues.title: Good tid() usage across all components
issues.description: All store components consistently use tid() for test IDs (product-card, product-card-link, product-card-name, product-card-price, cart-drawer-trigger, cart-item, category-filter, search-bar-input, etc.). ARIA attributes are also used correctly: aria-pressed on filter buttons, aria-expanded on FAQ toggles, aria-label on buttons. This follows the E2E selector rules well and will make future test writing straightforward.

issues.title: No tests for ProductCatalogPage
issues.description: ProductCatalogPage is the main page component that orchestrates filters (CategoryFilter, TypeFilter, SearchBar), product filtering logic (by category, type, and search query), and the ProductGrid. The filtering logic with useMemo is business logic that should be tested. No test file exists.
issues.rule: testing.md - All new pages/components must have tests
issues.fix: Create ProductCatalogPage.test.tsx testing: (1) renders title and filters, (2) products are displayed, (3) filtering by category/type/search reduces displayed products.

issues.title: No tests for ProductDetailPage
issues.description: ProductDetailPage is a complex page with multiple sections (hero, description, highlights, specs, screenshots, reviews, FAQ, seller). It resolves product data and renders conditional sections. No test file exists.
issues.rule: testing.md - All new pages/components must have tests
issues.fix: Create ProductDetailPage.test.tsx testing: (1) renders product name and price, (2) renders description section, (3) conditionally renders optional sections (FAQ, screenshots, reviews).

issues.title: No tests for getCategoryTheme utility
issues.description: getCategoryTheme is a pure function that maps ProductCategory to CategoryTheme. While simple, it's used throughout the product detail pages and a quick test would guard against accidental changes.
issues.rule: testing.md - All new utilities must have tests
issues.fix: Create constants.test.ts testing that each category returns the expected theme object and all categories are covered.

issues.title: No tests for FlyToCartContext
issues.description: FlyToCartContext provides animation context. While the animation itself is hard to test, the context provider/consumer pattern and the useFlyToCartContext hook should have basic tests to verify the context is provided correctly.
issues.rule: testing.md - All new hooks must have tests
issues.fix: Create FlyToCartContext.test.tsx testing: (1) context provides fire and setCartTarget, (2) useFlyToCartContext returns null outside provider.
